title: lobelia quadrisepala
intro: Lobelia quadrisepala, also known as the four-angled lobelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its expectorant and antispasmodic properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues and muscle spasms. The health benefits of Lobelia quadrisepala include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Lobelia quadrisepala can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support respiratory health and promote relaxation.
